Mitlab

R&D

Equipped with new and high-tech devices, research-oriented software and modern systems, the Research & Development Directional Computer Laboratory  was opened  on January 18, 2019.

The Laboratory, was established with the aids of TÜBİTAK 1001

“Investigation of Physical Properties of Exotic Hadrons”

project carried out by Prof. Dr. Kazem AZİZİ and with the contributions of Dogus University.

The Computer Laboratory, established with 36 modern devices in the first place, is also open to researchers, students and project groups for our academicians to use in all kinds of Research & Development studies.
